# X-Space360

> Premium Short-Term Rentals, Luxury Staycations, Office Spaces, and Event Venues in India.

## Description
X-Space360 is an Indian PropTech marketplace connecting guests, hosts, property owners, and businesses through a unified property booking platform. Users can search, compare, book, and manage short-term rental properties across India.

## AI Website Profile
- **Website Name**: X-Space360
- **Brand Name**: X-Space360
- **Official URL**: https://x-space360.in
- **Business Category**: PropTech / Hospitality Marketplace
- **Industry**: Real Estate & Accommodation
- **Country**: India
- **Languages**: English, Hindi, Marathi (multilingual ready)
- **Supported Cities**: Mumbai, Pune, Goa, Nashik, Udaipur, Manali (expanding nationwide)
- **Target Audience**: Corporate clients, leisure travelers, event organizers, property hosts, and real estate owners.

## Services
- Property Buying
- Property Selling
- Short-Term Rentals
- Villa Booking
- Apartment Booking
- Resort Booking
- Hotel Booking
- Homestay Booking
- Commercial Space Booking
- Office Space Booking
- Coworking Space Booking
- Event Venue Booking
- Property Listing
- Host Registration
- Property Management
- Vacation Rentals

## Supported Property Types
- Apartment
- Villa
- Hotel
- Resort
- Farmhouse
- Homestay
- Studio
- Office
- Commercial Space
- Event Venue
- Holiday Home
- Vacation Rental

## Important URLs
- **Homepage**: https://x-space360.in/
- **Properties / Browse**: https://x-space360.in/guest/browse
- **Become a Host**: https://x-space360.in/register?role=host
- **User Dashboard / Host Console**: https://x-space360.in/login
- **About Us**: https://x-space360.in/
- **Contact Support**: https://x-space360.in/
- **Privacy Policy**: https://x-space360.in/
- **Terms of Service**: https://x-space360.in/
- **FAQs**: https://x-space360.in/
- **Sitemap**: https://x-space360.in/sitemap.xml
- **Android APK Download**: https://uat.x-space360.in/api/download-apk
